code:
import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
let n = tokens.len()

mut best_idx = -1
mut best_count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let ti = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    ""
  end
  mut is_first = true
  mut j = 0
  while j < i
    let tj = match tokens.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      ""
    end
    if tj == ti
      is_first = false
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  if is_first
    mut count = 0
    mut k = i
    while k < n
      let tk = match tokens.get(k)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        ""
      end
      if tk == ti
        count = count + 1
      end
      k = k + 1
    end
    if count > best_count
      best_count = count
      best_idx = i
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let best_token = match tokens.get(best_idx)
when Some(x)
  x
when None
  ""
end

println("top=#{best_token}=#{best_count}")
